english: to wake (someone) / to stir up / to evoke
notes: Also: aufwecken (separable, same meaning). 'Erinnerungen wecken' = to stir up memories. 'Interesse wecken' = to arouse interest.

sentences.german: Das alte Foto weckt viele Erinnerungen.
sentences.english: The old photo stirs up many memories.

sentences.german: Das Video hat mein Interesse für Geschichte geweckt.
sentences.english: The video stirred up my interest in history.

cloze_sentences.english: The old photo stirs up many memories.
The video stirred up my interest.

cloze_sentences.text: Die Musik {{c1::weckte}} Erinnerungen an meine Kindheit.
cloze_sentences.english: The music stirred up memories of my childhood.
